faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with very good faculty members.

review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are good and clean. The hostel serves good quality food. Our college provides the best facilities like air-conditioners, good Wi-Fi, new and well-equipped labs, and a decent library. Labs have good computers with good internet connection. description: Shivpuri Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Shivpuri Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

The Shivpuri Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Shivpuri Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 176448 and 396926 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Enginee

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 176448 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 94326 in 2023 and 119151 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Shivpuri Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Shivpuri Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Shivpuri Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Shivpuri Institute of Technology.

Shivpuri Institute of Technology MP BE cutoff 2024 has been released for the second round. Students seeking admission to Shivpuri Institute of Technology have to qualify the MP BE exam to study BE/BTech courses at the college. The Shivpuri Institute of Technology Round 2 cutoff 2024 has been released across various specialisations among which B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most difficult course, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET courses stands around INR 1,22,000 to 2,59,200.

faqs.answer: A:    Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has courses such as B.Tech, BBA, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET goes up to 456.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities and value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are 60% of students who got placed. The average package is 3 LPA and the highest is 6 LPA. TCS and Ogrid are the top companies. About 90% of students got internships. The top roles offered by our college are in marketing and sales. Overall, placements are offered, but clearing and grabbing the opportunities is all on the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and classrooms are very clean, with AC in every classroom. Labs are for computer subjects, and there are three days of lab classes. The hostel is on the 7th floor, and all facilities are provided to the students, with some rules in place to maintain discipline.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied, overall good placement and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college, average placement was about 60% for students. The highest packages are offered at INR 14 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, and Infosys visit our campus. About 60% of students are interns at our college. Our college offers degrees like B.Tech., BBA., BCA., etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities and equipment, but it has no wi-fi campus. We have a well-maintained library, labs, and classrooms that are neat and clean, but in our college, the speed of the network does not work properly. The food is not good and well maintained, but we have the best ground to play sports like cricket, football, etc.

The Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET provides UG and PG courses that prepare candidates for their professional careers. All these programmes are offered in the streams of Engineering and IT & Software, among others. Admission is based on merit/entrance exam scores, with additional requirements for specific programs. Interested students can find a complete list of Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET courses, eligibility criteria, and tuition fees in the table below:

faqs.answer: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET is a reputed institute for B.Tech, BBA, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has a review rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 3.6 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.answer: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET is a reputed institute for B.Tech, BBA, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET has a review rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 3.6 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The real phase of college life.

content.Placements: As of now, what I have seen throughout my first year is that I don't see most of the seniors for campus placements. There are very few chances to spot a 4th-year student on a non-examination day. Many of my seniors told juniors to prepare ourselves for their future betterment, and there is no guarantee that college will give us placement with a high-end package. However, it's all on us.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is totally messed up. Most of the classroom requires renovation. It also needs to improve the lighting in classrooms, along with tables and benches. It has switchboards, but some of them are broken. Fan conditions in classrooms are okay, but in the canteen, they are totally dead.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good choice of yours to join this college.

content.Placements: MERI has an active placement cell that invites reputed companies for campus placements. Comapnies like Wipro, TCS, Infosys, and HDFC Bank are known to recruit from MERI. The Career Development Center conducts coding tests, mock technical interviews, and provides training in aptitude and programming skills.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities include computer labs, smart classrooms, and a digital library. College provides seminars, workshops, and practical training. A final-year project is mandatory and carries significant weight. Students are required to develop a complete software/application under faculty supervision.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and value for money.

content.Placements: There are 60% of students who got placed. The average package is 3 LPA and the highest is 6 LPA. TCS and Ogrid are the top companies. About 90% of students got internships. The top roles offered by our college are in marketing and sales. Overall, placements are offered, but clearing and grabbing the opportunities is all on the students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on every floor, and classrooms are very clean, with AC in every classroom. Labs are for computer subjects, and there are three days of lab classes. The hostel is on the 7th floor, and all facilities are provided to the students, with some rules in place to maintain discipline.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied, overall good placement and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our college, average placement was about 60% for students. The highest packages are offered at INR 14 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, and Infosys visit our campus. About 60% of students are interns at our college. Our college offers degrees like B.Tech., BBA., BCA., etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has all the facilities and equipment, but it has no wi-fi campus. We have a well-maintained library, labs, and classrooms that are neat and clean, but in our college, the speed of the network does not work properly. The food is not good and well maintained, but we have the best ground to play sports like cricket, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is big, and the classes are well maintained.Faculty members are experienced and helpful.

content.Placements: In our college, at least 60% of students were placed last year. The highest package in our college was INR 14 lacs per annum. The lowest package in our college was INR 4 lacs per annum. The average package in our college was INR 5 lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies in our college are Infosys and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: The overall condition of the college is good. All classes are properly air-conditioned, which helps a lot in the summer. The computer labs at our college have systems in good condition and a stable internet connection. Proper gym facilities are available. The canteen is clean, and the person cooking there is also experienced. We have proper grounds for football and cricket and courts for basketball and volleyball.

paragraphs: Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CEToffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include BBA, BCA, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,16,000 - 2,59,200. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the necessary infrastructure and is hygienic. It has a lot of facilities like libraries, sports centers, etc. Hostels are very good and have many facilities such as indoor and outdoor games, a music classroom, etc. Everything is well maintained in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Meri College of Engineering and Technology - MERI CET.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. The hostel is only for girls. Boys have to search the hostel themselves. Our canteen is very costly.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the infrastructure, but facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide good infrastructure. Classrooms and laboratories are old but well-painted and maintained. The library is excellent. A huge playground is available. Living spaces are clean. Washrooms should be clean.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two campuses. The first is the branch of the main campus, which is located in Janakpuri. It consists of Wi-Fi, a library, a canteen, an auditorium, and several rooms for different activities like dance, etc. The other campus is in Haryana, which is famous for sports and lab classes.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the management, which is not good in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are not good. There is a shortage of electricity and computers. Our classrooms are not good. The library is good. The hostel facilities are not good. The quality of the food is not good. There are limited food options. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and the college environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average infrastructure. The library and mess are good. Our classrooms are neat and clean. Projectors are available in classrooms. The network does not work properly. The Wi-Fi speed is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Great environment around the campus with good placement offers.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary facilities and equipment. The college doesn't have Wi-Fi campus. We have well maintained library, labs and classrooms. Washrooms need to be maintained. The food is not so good. There is a proper playground for outdoor sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the faculty. Good placements in CSE last year.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. The place is very big but it is not so safe. The classroom and lab facilities are good as there are very less number of students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, not good college or campus life.
reviews.review_text: The campus has all the required facilities. There is a library, which is big enough. Wi-Fi is provided all over the campus. Labs with all the required apparatus is available. Hostel facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all types of facilities like a well-maintained library with a collection of every type of book. Classrooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. There are various types of activities like various sports such as football, cricket, basketball, table tennis, etc. The canteen is very hygienic. Medical facilities are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college provides many excellent benefits for the students and mainly focuses on the future of the students. The top roles offered in my course are data scientist. Companies like IBM, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and many other companies visited our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is one of the top colleges in terms of infrastructure. Our college is also used for movie shooting. In the surroundings of Ibrahimpatnam, there are no other colleges that have infrastructure like AVNIET. It has a huge cricket ground, volleyball court, and basketball court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you join the college, you need to improve yourself.

content.Placements: Very less percentage of students are placed in my course, even though my course is a top course. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiters of our college are TCS and Infosys. No students got the internship in our college. Top roles are full stack developer and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for both boys and girls. There is no network in our college and no Wi-Fi in the college. There is no medical facility in the college. There is not much importance but some importance to the sports, mostly to cricket. The library is pretty good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Finally, I'm satisfied with what I have earned from the college.

content.Placements: There are placements in non-technical companies, not in the tech companies, and not even one tech company campus drive happened in our batch. I attended so many drives, but I didn't want to work in non-technical companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure was damn good, it's in the top 10 in infrastructure. By the way, PET sir and Madam were also so good and very encouraging in sports.

paragraphs: AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET) admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET) considers scores in GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET)offers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,92,000 - 3,68,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,36,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

A few more updates are below:

AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology (AVNIET) TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 34575 and 72453 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first roun

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 34575, 46191 and 51674, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

college_info.intro: Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology popular programmes are MTech and BTech. MTech and BTech students can become Engineers, Data Scientists, or can go for other job profiles. The Computer Science and Engineering department, in association with the CSI, industries, and other professional bodies organises several Technical and academic programmes. BTech students can make use of various facilities available in the college such as the Electronic Circuits Lab, Communication Lab ( Advanced Communication Lab), Microprocessor Lab, Digital Electronics Lab, Digital Signal Processing Lab, Embedded Systems Lab, Opto Electronics Lab / Fiber Optics Lab, and others. Below mentioned are some of the Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. The college offers MTech courses to students. BTech is offered in 6 specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, etc. at the PG level. MTech is offered in five specialisations, namely Computer & Information Science, Opto Electronics & Communication, Signal Processing, etc. Below are some of the Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology courses and their respective eligibility and:

admission_overview.college_name: Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Admission Process

admission_process.title: Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology admission 2025is open. The institute accepts students on an entrance basis. Students can pursue two programmes at the institute namely BTech and MTech. The admission process of the institute mainly commences online.SIST Trivandrumoffers the programme in affiliation with theAPJ Abdul Kalam Technological University.

Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology course admission is primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts students based on their performance in the selection rounds which involve academic merit in the last qualifying exam and valid entrance exam score. Students need to provide national or state-level entrance scores to be eligible for admission. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria forSarabhai Institute of Science and Technology courses:

The admission process of Sarabhai Institute of Science and Technology has several steps like selection, application, & seat confirmation. Students can fulfil the criteria of admission for the desired course before going for application. Interested students can follow all steps given below:
Step 1: SIST Trivandrum Application Process

The college usually accepts applications in both offline & online modes. Students have the choice to either download the form from the college's website or visit the campus of the college to get it with the prospectus. Online application is also there. To complete this, students can pay the application fees.
Step 2: SIST Trivandrum Selection Process

The college generally shortlists students based on accepted entrance examination valid scores. BTech aspirants must submit their KEAM score, while MTech aspirants must submit their GATE scores. The government fills 50% seats from the merit list of the state-level CET. The management files 35 % of seats based on the merit list of the state-level CET. Additionally, the remaining 5 % of seats are reserved for NRIs.
Step 3: SIST Trivandrum Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay admission fees to secure their spot at the institute.

On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, JNAFAU SPA - School of Planning and Architecture has a rating of 3.6 by students. review_summary.college_name: JNAFAU SPA Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, you make good friends and go on educational trips but the faculty here is egoistic.

content.Placements: As far as I've seen in the college, there happened a placement drive in which out of 65, only 12 were selected. This college doesn't teach everything and you're supposed to learn everything on your own, be it market surveys, case studies, and everything. You have to learn all the software on your own.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi at the college. There is no strong signal either. You have computer labs which are of old versions. Classrooms are okay, but in our classroom which is the 5th-floor 3rd studio. There is water leakage and there are no proper lockers or storage to keep our stuff. Benches are broken sometimes. Some can case bruises. There is no hostel in our college, so I don't know about the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Digital Techniques for Design and Planning (DTDP) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Lucky enough to find a place like this to learn.

content.Placements: I am 2022 batch, most of my classmates got placed or started as trainees in reputed corporates of Hyderabad. There were 58 members and around 48 members were placed in good companies. Most of the jobs were entry-level jobs. We got internships in many start-up companies in Jubilee Hills and Madhapur.
content.Infrastructure: The institute was well-equipped with books, computers, Wi-Fi, laboratories, library, and tools whichever were needed for the course. We had a canteen and hostel facility (from 2nd year), sports place, OAT, garden area, meet-up area, large classrooms, auditorium, etc. When I joined, it was all a basic facilities college but each year the development was so fast. This university completely transformed all the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Digital Techniques for Design and Planning (DTDP) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: JNAFAU- DTDP, practicality at its the finest.

content.Placements: Since a government college, the placements are good. Internships at various companies for design, architecture and GIS are offered as well. We get to work with the government projects offered to us through the faculty. Roles offered are game develops, town planning, architecture and designing.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are spacious and well kept. The library is huge and we have two labs. Wi-Fi is accessible to all. The canteen is up and running and the prices are student friendly too. There is no on campus hostel, but many near by to choose from.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Planning (SSS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dying path of Urban Planning.

content.Placements: Placements are practically zero, and students who do get jobs find them through their own internships and experience; without experience, finding jobs is extremely hard. Internships barely pay money, but after 5 to 7 years of experience in the planning field, pay is good.
content.Infrastructure: Very poor infrastructure, especially in my depth, had no proper projectors, and titles were broken in classrooms. If we wanted to use projectors, we had to check the lab, which had Pentium PCs that were very slow, and certain fans didn't work. My classroom had 4 sockets for 36 laptops, and when asked about increasing slots, my request was ignored.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Digital Techniques for Design and Planning (DTDP) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Jnafau, "The Diverse": This title is amazing because of its amazing course structure.

content.Placements: There were no placements provided by the college. Students have to find their internships on their own for the final year. These internships pay around INR 5,000–INR 10,000 per month. For their final semester, every student is required to do an internship. They do not provide any links or companies to approach; one has to approach companies on their own or through senior batches, and they do not care about the time.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was top-notch, especially the library and classroom labs. They do not provide any hostels for girls, but they do provide one for boys from 2 and up, which was very poorly maintained. Though the hostels were bad, the college environment and landscaping were good. It's peaceful, and they also have a sports room and a canteen, along with stationary inside the college for necessities.

A few more updates are below:

JNAFAU SPA - School of Planning and Architecture TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 72309 and 115634 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Digital Techniques for Design and Planning (DTDP) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Digital Techniques for Design and Planning (DTDP), B.Tech. in Planning (SSS) and B.Tech. in Facilities and Services Planning (SSS), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 72309, 95038 and 115634, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

They do not provide any hostels for girls, but they do provide one for boys from 2 and up, which was very poorly maintained. Though the hostels were bad, the college environment and landscaping were good. reviews.review_heading: A Good enough University for Architecture.
reviews.review_text: Library is really good and so is the faculty and overall course structure. It is not bad, it's a good college. There's no hostel provided. Canteen is under construction and it would be ready soon enough. We have a sports room for indoor games like table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty and placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classes and library are available. We students are satisfied with all the facilities. The quality of food and medical facilities is very poor in the hostel. Students face problems with the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied a lot. A very good college with very good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: It's one of the best universities in Telangana and the one and only Fine Arts University in Telangana. With good infrastructure facilities. Hostel food is good to eat and can have a very good eco-friendly environment. It also provides good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: JNAFAU has individual labs for every course with air-conditioning facilities. The classrooms are very spacious. The library is very spacious and has many books. Every book is available in the library. Hostel facilities are available, but many don't use them. An indoor games room is also available.

reviews.review_heading: College is not huge, but pleasant is more.
reviews.review_text: Smart classes and fine faculty and administration and playground is small. Hostel facility is avai5from 1st year and it is far away around 5kms from college. And college hostel is not well-equipped. Hostel fee is very low and it provides only B.Ed and water.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for B.Arch and for fine arts courses.
reviews.review_text: The college provides lab and library facilities. Classrooms are better in our college. It provides internet, but it does not connect. There is no girls' hostel. It has dormitories for boys, which is not at all good with respect to my knowledge through my friends.

reviews.review_heading: Not really good at infrastructure and facilities but best at its faculty.
reviews.review_text: Though it is a government university, it does not seem like an university at all. There is a small ground which is used for parking vehicles mostly by outsiders. And besides this small ground there is no other ground in the university. There is no Wi-Fi available for students to work. There is no canteen for now, but it is in construction and may be opened by 2023. And coming to hostels, there is only one boys hostel for the university. But keeping these aside the best thing that university prov...

reviews.review_heading: It is the only college in India with good infrastructure and library at such a low cost.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is extremely good as it is an architectural college the design and all were nice. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are digitalised & there is an extraordinary library in south India. The main thing is that the college hostel isn't that good and it's far away from the college. Canteen is under construction. Sports facilities are good enough. Overall the infrastructure is decent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and it has good faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like computer lab, studio lab, and library are provided. Classrooms are big enough for 60 students. No ground is available in our college. The hostel is not provided for 1st-year students, but it is provided for all 2nd, 3rd, and 4th-year students. Mess is not available in hostels. There is a sports room in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not good as it looks.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good enough. There is a computer lab, classrooms with blackboard and smartboard, Wi-Fi and India's 2nd big library with architecture books. The library is huge enough to study well. Our college hostel is situated in Abids, and the hostel will be below average. The food won't be provided in the hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: I am only dissatisfied with the placements and cleanliness of our college.

review_content.Placements: My batch is from 2022 to 2026 in CSE IOT. Companies like Cognizant, Sutherland, etc, are the recruiting companies that came to our college. 60% of students from my course got internship opportunity. Due to these reasons, I gave a two star rating for my college in terms of placements as it is not up to the mark and as good as compared to other Engineering colleges present in the city.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many labs present in our college, like Chemistry lab, Digital Electronics lab, etc, which provide all the basic requirements for the students. Library is much better compared to the labs as it contains many textbooks, reference books, and journals. There are no Wi-Fi, medical, or hostel facilities in our college. Canteen food is of decent quality. Sports and games are also provided.

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want enjoyment, entertainment, and a normal college life, I suggest you don't!

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing my B.Tech in Data Science course with a total of 128 students. As far as my knowledge goes, the highest package was 20 LPA, the average was 8-10 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA. Most of the companies belong to the BPO category, and some renowned companies like TCS, Capgemini, etc., also approach us. It was low, to be honest, and most were placed in small companies, with only a few people getting placed in renowned companies like TCS, etc. Major roles like DBMS, data handling, and also NLP basics are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, the college is not as big as other colleges comparatively. It has 2 blocks, and the infrastructure is average. There is no hostel facility as it is located in the heart of the city, and you can approach the college through any means. So there is no problem in travelling, and it can also be helpful for the students who live far away, as they can come by bus, train, or metro.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Not a good college for students who are seeking high-paying jobs.

content.Placements: I am from the batch of 2022-2026, and my course is CSE (IOT) with a class strength of 56 students. There are only 30% of students in our course who got internships from companies like Cognizant, Tech Mahindra and Sutherland. The highest package is of 8 LPA, and the lowest package is of 5 LPA for our course.
content.Infrastructure: Every classroom in our college has a projector, and classrooms are decent in terms of maintenance. There is no hostel facility in our college. Some of the labs, like Chemistry and electrical engineering labs, are maintained very neatly. The food available in the canteen is decent in terms of taste and price. The library in our college is very good with well-stacked books and journals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am only dissatisfied with the placements and cleanliness of our college.

content.Placements: My batch is from 2022 to 2026 in CSE IOT. Companies like Cognizant, Sutherland, etc, are the recruiting companies that came to our college. 60% of students from my course got internship opportunity. Due to these reasons, I gave a two star rating for my college in terms of placements as it is not up to the mark and as good as compared to other Engineering colleges present in the city.
content.Infrastructure: There are many labs present in our college, like Chemistry lab, Digital Electronics lab, etc, which provide all the basic requirements for the students. Library is much better compared to the labs as it contains many textbooks, reference books, and journals. There are no Wi-Fi, medical, or hostel facilities in our college. Canteen food is of decent quality. Sports and games are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely feeling below average.

content.Placements: Very few placements are there, in that one or two people are getting recruited. All the companies are very bad startups. They are not bringing any internship opportunities for the students. Students themselves are searching for jobs and internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in the college is not as good as expected. Hostel and bus facilities are not available. In labs, most of the computer systems won't work properly. Sports and games will be conducted once a year before annual day. They don't provide a Wi-Fi connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2024 and it is now autonomous college, so for freshers it is good option.

content.Placements: Computer Science Engineering has many job offers these days. Our college provided more than 450 placements last year. Top recruiter is Wipro. Almost 80% of students are placed in good companies. SVIT also provides internships for 2nd and 3rd year students.
content.Infrastructure: SVIT facilities are average and classrooms are above average. Library and labs are good. But they don't provide Wi-Fi for students. SVIT does not provide hostel facilities, and students need to stay in private hostels. Food in canteen is good. And sports and games are available.

description: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Swami Vivekananda Institute of Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 27668 and 61337 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, us

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 27668, 33533 and 50913, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

reviews.review_heading: According to me, my college is above average but it has good auditorium, library,lab,canteen,ground.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not available at our college. Our college contains good labs, decent classrooms, a decent canteen, and a very good library. Wi-Fi is not available on the whole campus, but sometimes we have to face very difficult connections to the network, and sometimes the network is very slow. This should not be improved yet.

reviews.review_heading: Want to get an honest review on SVIT? Read this.
reviews.review_text: No hostel is available, but the canteen food is good and you can get PGs around the college easily, and it will be reasonable in price. As its campus is in the center of the city, everything will be available nearby, even coaching like Ameerpet and Begumpet at a very reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, campus placements, and the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, Library and washrooms are all maintained well in the campus. The college has a good educational atmosphere. A canteen is available in the campus, food can be rated 4/5. They have enough place for parking too. But there is no separate space for ground.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college for certification with a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent which is more like that of an education oriented institute. The classrooms are okay and are digital and the labs have equipments which are just for your course. The library is one of the best features of this college, though there are no novels or fiction, we get a lot of study related materials.

reviews.review_heading: Join SVIT, this will help you!
reviews.review_text: Food quality in the mess is pretty good and fair in price. You won't get a good atmosphere here in the canteen and every other place as you would expect from the movies or the least you can expect out of a college. Extra curricular activities are pretty dry here, they are not held as the college won't support them.

reviews.review_heading: Read this before joining SVIT.
reviews.review_text: Campus is small but has every necessary equipment required for the students. They support you in every possible way in everything, just don't lag behind with your academics. Food in the canteen is fairly priced and they have good food. You need to compromise with sports as they have a small ground and organise sports events yearly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with college life, infrastructure, and no placements; will not recommend it.
reviews.review_text:
No proper labs, no hostel, no Wi-Fi, no proper food, computers are not working properly, most of the parts are broken, the canteen does not have many items, and the canteen looks the worst.
No Wi-Fi is provided to the students.
No stationery or xerox is available in college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The library is quite good. It has many books. There is no hostel in our college. We have a canteen. The food served in the canteen is average. There is no ground in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in our college. You should stay in private hostels. Our labs are not good. The equipment is not working well. Our college does not have a ground to play. Sports and games are not available in our college. Our college does not provide medical facilities. The library is good. The infrastructure of our college is average. We have a small canteen in our college. It provides average food.

reviews.review_heading: This college only provides a little support to get placements.
reviews.review_text: About 60% of students were placed in the previous academic year. The highest package is 20 LPA. Top MNCs provide job opportunities. Internships are also provided at top MNCs. The lowest package is around 6 LPA. CSE students are offered good job roles. Students who learn coding are settled in high positions.

reviews_list.review_title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

review_content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

review_summary.college_name: RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is worth reading in this college. All teachers and staff members are supportive and friendly.

content.Placements: There are around 73 students in our class. The highest salary package offered is about 9 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Around 85% of the students got internships from our course because it is a must and in the final semester it carries marks.
content.Infrastructure: ]Our college has a good infrastructure. There is a small canteen which is near the ground. He prepares all the items which are good for our health and it is hygienic as well. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution.

content.Placements: According to my knowledge, 60% of students got placed in computer science and engineering department. The annual package offered was around 1.5 to 3 LPA. Some students got seats through CET. It was around 70,000 for them. There were different branches in engineering, like mechanical, computer science, biomedical, civil engineering etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The college has a library, from where we can take books, read them and even take them home. Later, we have to return them. Our classrooms are good. There are many different auditoriums for different branches. Labs are not fully equipped.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.

content.Placements: I was in computer science student, and we had 2 sections. The highest strength is recorded in CSE followed by biomedical engineering. There were no placements in 2020 and 2021. I think it was due to covid-19 situation. Now, there might be placements from this year.
content.Infrastructure: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any placement opportunities. Sometimes, local business people visit the college to hire students. So they don't even conduct any placement drives. Whenever a company visit the college, they just go back without hiring any student. They organise a job fair which is useless, and this is a business trick to make money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied by the Infrastructure of college,Good faculties and average Placements.

content.Placements: Placements for my batch has not yet started. But for my seniors batch the placements was held. And only 5 students were selected out of 60. The highest average salary was offered 3,00000 and the lowest was about 150000. The companies visited our campus for placements are Wipro, Infosys, IBM, and several other companies also. Different kinds of roles were offered to the selected members like Testing, Software development, Web desighee etc. There are no internships given to the students. And there is no proper placement cell in the college. In my opinion placements in our college are not much useful for students. I think in future the placements will be given more and it will be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RGC - Rajiv Gandhi Group of Institution.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The college has a library, from where we can take books, read them and even take them home. Later, we have to return them. Our classrooms are good. There are many different auditoriums for different branches. Labs are not fully equipped.

reviews.review_heading: I have enjoyed my 4 years in RGIT, and I had the best time on campus.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, but some of my friends are from Kerala. They used to stay in the hostel. They always used to say that the hostel food was bad. Rooms are always clean and have separate restrooms. They had to follow hostel timings, and they were not allowed to go out after 9 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the off-course faculty and their behaviour.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but there is no playground. It's difficult to survive in the college for four years. Classrooms and labs are in the worst condition. I suggest you be careful when you choose a college. The equipment in the labs is good, and all the equipment is useless.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied by the Infrastructure of college,Good faculties and average Placements.
reviews.review_text: The College Campus environment is really good with having plenty of tree shades around. But there is no proper parking facility for both students and faculty members vehicles. The facilities provided in this college include Labs, Classrooms, Library, Sports and Games. The quality of labs is good. The labs are maintained properly and all the computers in the labs are in good working condition and have all types of software's. The quality of food we can get in the college campus is average. We can...

reviews.review_heading: The placements could have been better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, and not bad. Still, the labs and workshops can be well-established. They should bring in good, and little canteens are inside the campus, who can provide good and hygienic food. They should facilitate Wi-Fi for students, which helps them in career enhancement. They should provide proper parking slots for student's vehicles.

reviews.review_heading: It is fairly a good college, but do not take this as the first choice as there are some issues.
reviews.review_text: There is no access to Wi-Fi. The labs are good, classrooms are average, and the library is good. The college has badminton and basketball courts available. The quality of labs is good, it has necessary things in it. No issues. The classrooms are average but not that good. The quality of food is average, the hostels are good and have average food. The infrastructure issues were there, but those were resolved. The college is average in infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disagreeing with the college attitude.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, and there is no sports or ground, but they organise sports once in a year. The classes are okay, but I am not satisfied with that. The library is not good, and there is no digital library, and they are not mandatory,  but they are trying to get one.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college. Just visit and check before joining the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it in a very less area. The college doesn't have a big playground, but yearly they conduct sports. There are different medical colleges on the same campus. The college also looks good. The teachers are very friendly, and there is a small canteen inside the college, but it's not good to lunch at noon.

reviews.review_heading: A name not suitable for the college, don't think its a good college just because of its location.
reviews.review_text: There is no open Wi-Fi facility provided to the students. The labs are decent but nothing to shout about. The library is good overall but lacks data-handbooks for the mechanical branch students in sufficient numbers. There is one basketball court and a volleyball court. Sports day is conducted in HMT grounds. The quality of food is average. In the hostel, in one room 3-4 people have to accommodate. The college is having less number of toilets compared to the number of students, which is one real...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied by the infrastructure, teaching and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was the worst among any other colleges in Bangalore. The building stands in a very remote place with less space. There was no gate or wall around the college which makes all the commutators and locals pass by the college and even the street dogs roam around the classrooms. They don't have a playground nor a parking lot in the college. Hostel was insecure because the hostel was inside the college. The hostels were the old classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am not happy with my college because they didn't provide placements and placement training.
reviews.review_text:
Not good. It is nice to see the campus from the outside but the facilities in the classroom are very poor. They don't have PPTs in classrooms.
Desks are always broken. Fans are not working properly. Labs are the worst (mechanical).
Computer labs have old software which is outdated. Machines in the labs are also too old. They just provide a demo and tell us to write the values from the old record book.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements of the college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure structure, in my point of view, was not at all a good surrounding campus as the college was near local locality between the homes of the people. There was not enough space in the college and we never had any place to play outdoor games except for basketball court and a baseball place.

I have completed BE in 2014 from this Institute. The management is really not good, they charge money for petty things like breakage fee. The teaching is nice as compared to the other colleges. review_content.Placements: UST Global, IBS, Quest Global, QBURST, and similar companies come for placement drives every year. reviews_list.review_title: The Best Campus In Kerala.

review_content.Placements: We are the first batch of AI ML in our college. So there have never been any placements yet. But the placements of other batches have been really good so far. During the last academic year 90% of passed students in our college have been placed in leading companies like technopark, vipro, etc. The average salary offered range from 3 to 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilites in our college are really good so far. We have college Wi-Fi that is available throughout our campus that is really fast. The lab and facilities are on a different level. It is really clean and the computer are really fast. There won't be power related problems as we have inverters in labs. As for the classroom, the amount of work they done on it is really appreciable. Classrooms are cleaned daily by the faculty responsible. We have the most appreciable and hygienic hostel. The food available in the hostel is also really good. The hostels environment is also good. It helps us to calm down and it really feels like we are in our own home. The canteen in also really good. It offers a large menu with really awesome dishes of Kerala. The Chicken Biriyani is a must try. We have a football ground, cricket ground, Volleyball court, Badminton court, Basketball court as well as a boxing bring. The medical facilities are top notch. We have a large infirmary with Basic medical care unit.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Peaceful Atmosphere for Education.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of every class are getting placed. The highest package offered was 12 Lacs per annum; the lowest is about 5 to 6 Lacs, and the average package offered is around 8-10 Lacs per annum. Most recruitment is done by companies like Tata, Qburst, Kinfra, UST Global, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: There is no college hostel; we should privately acquire one. The college is a small and peaceful space for students, which ensures students are not crowded. The food in the canteen is good, but there isn't an ideal menu to stick to, so we cannot move on the basis of a timetable for our food habits.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A small college built with great ambitions.

content.Placements: Our college has a 60 to 70% placement ratio. The highest salary package would be around 80 LPA, and the lowest would be around 30 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are Tata Consultancies, HMSC, Foxconn, etc. Around 40% of students from my course got the opportunity to do internship in these previously mentioned companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the bare minimum, I would say. Our college consists of 4 buildings. There are two academic buildings and two buildings for labs and workshops. There is a playground in front of one of the academic blocks, which can be used for sports like cricket football, etc. There is also a canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am really enjoying my college life here.
reviews.review_text: College have digital classrooms with good benches fan light windows etc. They provide a class with good environment. College don't have hostel facility. But give the preferred private hostel details. Teachers regularly check the private hostels and if there is any problem they will give all help to them.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college that provides decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides decent facilities. It has clean surroundings. It has fully established labs, classrooms, a good library, and a study space for students. This college doesn't have its own hostel facilities. It has tie-ups with some private hostels nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement. Not good infrastructure. Not enough publicity for the college.
reviews.review_text: No Hostel is available. Infrastructure is good. It is a small college. So not enough buildings are there. Now the buildings are renovated and it is good. The existing buildings are good. But we need more buildings and the Government is not considering it. There is approval for different courses. But because of lack of buildings it is not possible to start it.

reviews.review_heading: Small campus yet an engaging and friendly campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is comparatively small and doesn't have all the facilities that other top colleges may have. But still you may have a really good college experience and a nice college life. But the lack of strength in students may be a bit discouraging.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and peaceful college.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure availability are very good and excellent, including free Wi-Fi, projectors in all classrooms, equipment in labs, and also almost all types of study books are provided by the library. The college did not have its own hostel, but it always took full responsibility and provided a well-facilitated hostel near the college. The hostel provides good quality food, medical facilities, and sports and games.

college_info.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Founded in 2019, Bhagwan Mahavir University is a private university. It is located in Surat, Gujarat. The institute is accredited with INC, AICTE and PCI. Bhagwan Mahavir University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 184 courses across specialisations such as Data Science, Aeronautical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automation and Automobile Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Bhagwan Mahavir University fees ranges between INR 18,000 to 4,35,750. The student intake for these courses is 7142. Bhagwan Mahavir University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). Bhagwan Mahavir University offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bhagwan Mahavir University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Bhagwan Mahavir University offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Bhagwan Mahavir University courses range between INR 18,000 to 4,35,750.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

review_content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

review_summary.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good university in Surat.

content.Placements: Placements are given but not more than 25000 rupees. Placements are given in big companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Tata Motors, and many other companies. All courses are available. Here computer students are more than other students so placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided here. Infrastructure is also very good. All departments are separate. There are many classes. Each class has 50 students. Canteen is very good and hygienic. All types of food are available here, and staffs are also good in nature, friendly, and cheaper than market.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not recommended for anyone. You should try some other colleges.

content.Placements: Not many students get placed from the college. The college claims 100% placement, but that is not true, so don't trust them. In Computer Science, placements are based on grades and marks, which often lead to cheap and unknown companies or services.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available here. The labs are good, but the Wi-Fi is poor and not accessible to students. The library is very small, with no comfortable seating. The computers in the labs are not well maintained and can go down at any time. There is no official canteen; there are some stalls, but they are not satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college and I got good friends.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placement. The highest package is 1cr per annum, and the lowest package is 10L per annum. The top companies are HCL, MICROSOFT, BOSCH, and 100+ companies. 50 percent of students got internships in our college. The top role offered in our course is MICROSOFT.
content.Infrastructure: In my Artificial Intelligence and Data Science course, we have the best computer lab. There is no Wi-Fi in our college, but classrooms are okay. The library is the best library in our college. The facilities are okay, but the food is not of good quality. All types of sports are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the unqualified faculty, not worth the money.

content.Placements: Only 1% of my college's students were placed. The highest package in a startup company is INR 2LPA, and the lowest package is INR 1LPA. The company only hired for internships, with no guarantee of permanent employment for students. Only one student got an internship at the New Startup Company in Coimbatore. The software developer role is offered by the company.
content.Infrastructure: There is no WIFI on the college campus or in the hostel. There are no primary facilities on campus, such as restrooms. The library is available at any time. Large computer lab, but the system doesn't work and the staff doesn't teach anything in the lab. In hostels, food quality is average. Hostel rooms are better, and restrooms are not hygienic or clean. There are no medical facilities in the college or hostel. The college management doesn't take any care of sports and games. Games are conducted by only the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you look for another college.

content.Placements: There are less than 25% of placements in our college. The average salary package is Rs. 15,000 per month. reviews.review_heading: Good college and I got good friends.
reviews.review_text: In my Artificial Intelligence and Data Science course, we have the best computer lab. There is no Wi-Fi in our college, but classrooms are okay. The library is the best library in our college. The facilities are okay, but the food is not of good quality. All types of sports are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the unqualified faculty, not worth the money.
reviews.review_text: There is no WIFI on the college campus or in the hostel. There are no primary facilities on campus, such as restrooms. The library is available at any time. Large computer lab, but the system doesn't work and the staff doesn't teach anything in the lab. In hostels, food quality is average. Hostel rooms are better, and restrooms are not hygienic or clean. There are no medical facilities in the college or hostel. The college management doesn't take any care of sports and games. Games are conducted...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provided good placements in 2013.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is not that good because of the management. They should improve immediately, but it's taken time to do it. There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our college. Labs are available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good, and facilities are provided. The food is not very good. Medical and sports are provided in this college. Most of the students interested in sports. The canteen has good snacks and milk shakes. There is no Wi-Fi provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you look for another college.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available for only staff, not for students. The classrooms in our college are looking bad. Hostel food and accommodation are literally the worst I've ever seen. Staff will not teach properly. Because staff could not get paid for their job, they would not teach us.

reviews.review_heading: There is good teaching before corona, but now the situation is different.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent, but this college was opened in 1996. The buildings are old. There is a separate department for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college. Please avoid it.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi and the labs are not functioning in our college. Our hostel is very dirty and does not have a good restroom. The food is also very bland sometimes. Sometimes we don't have water in our college. There is no warden at the hostel and the hostel fees are very high. This college is a waste of our money. The classrooms are very old. The new block is only for 1st-year students.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The condition of the environment and infrastructure is very poor. Maintainance of college facilities is very low, maintaining of buses is also not in a proper way. We enjoy raining inside in the rainy season. Even roadside food will be better and healthier than our college food. There is no proper medical facility, and there is no support for sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely good, but the placements need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are good. The college is near to the main road, so transportation is  easy. Labs are well-equipped and maintained, but the lab in-charge needs to check it properly. Hostels are average for the students to stay, and food quality needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied, and it is a waste of studying here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are moderate, and the infrastructure is also not well. There are no proper labs for all departments. The hostel is the worst. There is no proper maintenance and no regular water supply, and even drinking water is also not available. The canteen served the worst food even after paying Rs. 70,000 per annum.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, but it should be developed.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an ambient atmosphere, and I am proud that aeronautics in Tamil Nadu was launched first by our institutions only. The food served in the hostel is not as expected, so they need to change the food quality. However, hostel room facilities are awesome for NRI boys and girls. Sports and games facilities are also available here. Our college conducts separate classes for games and other extracurricular activities like NSS, Tamil Mandram, etc. The fee for our course ranges from Rs. 40,0...

reviews.review_heading: If you join the college you will be disappoited.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided an average hostel at a high cost. There were 3-4 different types of hotels, but the food served was not satisfactory, and even the amount of food served was very high. Quality and taste were in the worst condition. Many students spoiled their life by joining this college, including me. I am disappointed.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and we'll good infrastructure to study.
reviews.review_text: We have very good Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are good but we don't get much benefits from here because they don't have good equipments. Classrooms are cleaned everyday it's very nice but to sit in the benches you have to suffer a lot. Having good friends in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Quality for price, hope of life.
reviews.review_text:
All the course lab are available but some of equipment repair ( natural repair)
In each lab has one lab maintener and assistant
Library is clean and pure, all the book are available but old edition is well state
Wi-Fi only for laptop use only if you what to use Wi-Fi want to get permission to access. ( Wi-Fi is slow and poor)
Class are allocated of department related, there is no need of sharing class
Water is not available in sub campus, only in main campus
Hostel
There is no resection in hoste...

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty for guiding students - Mechanical engineering.
reviews.review_text: The first year block is separate along with the administrative office, when you enter in to the department from 2nd year to final year there is a separate block and for mechanical every lab facilities is being provided In additional to this there is Techno park for CSE and IT students and inside the campus there is a private canteen and college canteen separately.

review_content.Placements: Students who score 80% are eligible for placements. Selected students may receive offers from top companies like ZOHO, TCS, HCL, and Fibro through counseling. Almost 80% of students receive internships. The top role offered is the technical operator.
