faqs.answer: Mangayarkarasi College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and placements. Everything is bad.

review_content.Placements: College faculty members say that they provide 100% placement to students, but they give only 60%, and none of it is in the IT sector. They provide placement for B.Tech students in sales roles. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. There are no top recruiters. All are sales companies. review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is okay. There are a total of four buildings. One is for B.Tech 1st, 3rd, and 4th year and Diploma. The second is for B.Tech 2nd year and all management courses. The third building is for Architecture, and the fourth is for Pharmacy. They provide AC only in the first year. After that, there is no AC. There is only one canteen, and the food is very bad. Wi-Fi is available, but they never share the passwords.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available in every place on the campus. The library and classrooms are very neat and clean. The hostel facilities are awesome like rooms, washrooms, bathrooms, and sports. The mess food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Sanskar but not the sanskar in college, so much discipline is like school.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are not good, not look like a college standard. According to the hostler, food is not good. Medical facilities are also not good. Canteen food is not good, and not provide anything. In hostel, geyser is not provided in winter.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable with excellent faculty, modern infrastructure, and a great learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities of the college are outstanding, and the infrastructure is always impressive. The hostel facilities are good, with well-furnished rooms that include beds, almirahs, chairs, and study tables. The food quality is also good, with a different menu for each day. Medical and sports facilities are available on campus, so there’s no need to go outside for anything.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, but mess food is not good. Very good greenery. I love that the good infrastructure of the library is good, the stationery is good, and the labs are well furnished with good instruments. I also appreciate the greenery of the photoshoot place as well. Sports facilities include a cricket ground and a volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities and infrastructure. Our college building is well-maintained. Classrooms are neat. Medical facilities are available in our college. The hostel is very good, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in all classrooms. We can use Wi-Fi on laptops. The library is good. The food served in the hostel is good. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available for students. They can use it on their laptops. Our college has classrooms and labs. Our classrooms are spacious. The library has many books. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Our college has good security.

reviews.review_heading: Good and complete review .
reviews.review_text: Facilities for students are very good in terms of infrastructure and library is very big and informative good Wi-Fi free connection classrooms are very big and good. The hostel facilities are very good there is gym for students big ground good mess. Games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend you to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities such as a good sports ground and books in the library. Fees can be paid in six installments. The infrastructure of the college is good. The building is not big, but there are many trees and plants on campus which make it more beautiful. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of food in the hostel is good. There are many sports items available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College Infrastructure is pretty good, but the placement is average .
reviews.review_text:
College Infrastructure is pretty good with greenery all around.
Wi-Fi was not available for students when I was studying there. But, may be it is available now.
Hostel and bus services for students are available. Mess food is not so good i.e. quality is average.

review_content.Placements: Placement in our college is not that good; the companies that provide placements are limited, and the selection process isn't robust. reviews_list.review_title: College life here is good.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed in IT companies. The maximum package offered is 14 LPA, and the minimum package is 2 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides frontage for parking area for students as well as teachers. There is a special area for buses. Wi-Fi is available on campus (Jio private net). A lawn is available in the center. Labs have updated technologies. The classrooms have very good benches. Every hostel room has a separate washroom. The mess and canteen provide fresh food every day.

review_summary.college_name: SKN Sinhgad College of Engineering Pandharpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placement results in the last 5 years.

content.Placements: I can say 70% of students get placed every year. The highest package currently in my batch is 12 LPA to a girl in Nvidia she is placed in Nvidia. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and average goes to 5 LPA every year. Talking about recruiting companies in our course, they are Nvidia, Capgemini, Cognizant, and TCS which come to our campus for recruitment. Top roles offered are better environment for studying, best teachers for teaching, and they are supportive in every manner.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available in our course. Department consists of 5 to 6 labs which are Wi-Fi connected. Wi-Fi is provided unlimited throughout the day. Students can stay in the lab for 24 hours when they want to discuss. The quality of food is average in hostel I would say, and hostel rooms are much big and have more space.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Exposing SKN with no harsh words.

content.Placements: As a software developer, back-end developer, front-end developer, full stack developer, web developer or data science, data analytics, and cloud computing are major areas offered in our college. However, they are not offered by big companies and not so good packages. Even college faculty do not teach those skills, we have to take paid courses for that.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food is quite average sometimes it's average or below average. Drinking water tastes not so good and cleaning should be done regularly however, it is not but what can we do. Otherwise, Wi-Fi issue is of everyday problem can't even get 10 KB per second.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College campus was very nice but the placement was not that strong, though you can still consider.

content.Placements: Placement in our college is not that good; the companies that provide placements are limited, and the selection process isn't robust. However, the placement cell is very good and is trying its best to help us, but placements are still not happening as much. The reason behind this is the teaching pattern.
content.Infrastructure: The building and hostel of the college are very good, with a lot of greenery, trees, flowers, and a playground provided. The classrooms are nice, and the infrastructure of the college is well structured. The overall environment of the college is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College life here is good.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed in IT companies. The maximum package offered is 14 LPA, and the minimum package is 2 LPA. TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, TE-Connectivity, etc., companies come here. Mechanical students are offered the roles of inspection, advisory, manager, quality inspection officer, CNC and VMC operators.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides frontage for parking area for students as well as teachers. There is a special area for buses. Wi-Fi is available on campus (Jio private net). A lawn is available in the center. Labs have updated technologies. The classrooms have very good benches. Every hostel room has a separate washroom. The mess and canteen provide fresh food every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good campus environment and placements are good.

content.Placements: In our college for placement almost 200+ companies visits our campus like Accenture, Cognizant and top MNCs. College provides lots of trainings related to placement. College also calls core companies for core branches. From e and tc almost 80% students got placed in top MNCs .
content.Infrastructure: College is big in the field of campus. Well structured and infrastructure is very good. College has concentrated on greenery around college so lots green plants are there. About hostel, hostel has big rooms and separate bathroom for each room. Mess is very good.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel.description:
Separate wing for the foreign student in both boys and girls hostels with additional facilities for cooking and washing
Hostels have fully furnished rooms, TV, secured Wi-Fi, dining hall, sufficient number of toilets, furniture and recreation area

library.description:
The central library is enriched by 46500 books with 12000 titles of various books of all disciplines of Engineering, Management and Sciences. Along with 5000 reference books, it also has 207 national/ international periodicals and journals. The library also possesses 1300 CDs as offline databases. 
A dedicated six storey building with huge reading halls and modern amenities is allotted to the library facilities of the campus and the central library is open for 24 hours on all days in a year with the seating capacity of more than 3500.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with hostel quality and the mess but placements are good in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms and is good. Hostel quality is moderately good but the food served is not much good. reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in our town. I would recommend joining it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S.K.N. Sinhgad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in all days except for college hours. Classrooms are always posh, clean and huge. Labs are available with good equipment. The library is open for 24 hours to study. Mess and canteen provide a good quality of food. For medical emergencies, first aid box is available, and for 24 hours, a doctor is available on the campus. Sports ground and gaming zones are available in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with the college infrastructure, teaching quality and placements.

But the only thing is the college doesn't provide good sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best campus with great facilities and infrastructure.

Various extracurricular activities are also conducted. The college encourages all kinds of sports.

Hostel rooms are also provided with the best facilities like 24x7 water and electricity. Medical Officer is also appointed to take care of any medical emergency.

reviews.review_heading: The college has quality faculty and infrastructure.

For the library, there is an entire building where you get all books you require, and the best part is it is open for 24 hours to study. You can exchange books during college hours only.

reviews.review_heading: It has the very good infrastructure, teaching staff, and other facilities, but no good placements.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a good infrastructure. It has big ground for sports students. The library has more than enough books for education purpose. It also has many interesting other books for general knowledge and every newspaper of regional languages and many more. It has Wi-Fi access but not during college hours.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.

content.Placements: Placements in Ayurveda differ from technical fields, so the university ensures solid clinical training during the internship year. Many students start their own practice, prepare for MD/MS (Ayurveda), or go into wellness sectors. The hospital and OPD experience here builds strong diagnostic and patient handling skills. This foundation is essential for future growth as an Ayurvedic practitioner or entrepreneur.
content.Infrastructure: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. The mess food is simple and nutritious and the peaceful hill setting truly enhances focus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the environment and facilities.

content.Placements: Our course is for becoming a teacher. Our college gives the opportunity to join there college as a teacher. Students can also pursue further study along with the teaching in the same college. Our college does not provide any placements in any other company.
content.Infrastructure: Labs contain enough equipment for us. Libraries also provide almost every book that is needed related to our subjects. There is a cafeteria inside the campus that provides good food. Hostels are also good but I do not live in hostel so don't know much about it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the study environment, infrastructure, and climate of this college.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students got placed in 2018. It is the best college for education, outdoor activities, and field works. I recommend students to take admission to this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a good and beautiful environment. Digital classrooms are available with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good and are now restructured with more cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It serves good food three times a day.
content.Faculty: All the teachers in our college are well qualified and they have done post-graduation. They are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant which makes students doctors. Exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 85%.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Heaven for those who love study and sports.

content.Placements: Placement level is not good. But, for electrical engineers, they have some companies. I have placed in X Perto solar, this is solar company situated at Mandi and but in Solar appliances hand all over India they work in solar water purifier, Solar Power Plant, solar street lights.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are free compact classrooms are clean and medical facility also available. There are lots of sports, festivals all these are available at the campus and also have a canteen facility, and all hostels rooms are well- designed with all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is very peaceful.

content.Placements: You can also get your degree in a good environment. Internships are offered in multiple hospitals and laboratories. Our campus has good vibes. You have to work hard to achieve your desired goals.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are decent. Hostels are very good. Classrooms are spacious. There is a decent library in this college. Modern facilities are not available such as KFC, Domino's, etc. Laboratory technician and helper positions are available in this college.
content.Faculty: Semester exams are moderately difficult. Staff members are very cooperative. Terminal and final exams are conducted very well. Half-term and mid-term are comparatively easier than final-term. The pass marks are 100. The course curriculum is decent. Exams are conducted in multipurpose halls and strictness is maintained.

admission_overview.title: Abhilashi University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Abhilashi University, Mandi, offers more than 40 courses under its five faculties including UG, PG and doctoral degree programmes, diploma, PG diploma, and certificate courses. The university offers courses in Agriculture, Engineering Management, Ayurveda, Pharmacy, Humanities, Education, and Basic Science. The mode of application at the Abhilashi University is online. Admission to various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. The students of Abhilashi University are eligible for a range of merit-based and need-based scholarships provided under various categories. The university provides numerous placement opportunities to students in top-notch companies and organisations like HDFC Bank Ltd., Reliance Life Insurance, Macleods Pharmaceutical Ltd., Infotech, Mankind Pharma Ltd, and Alps Healthcare Ltd.

paragraphs: Theadmission procedure for Abhilashi Universityhas multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, applying, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission have to clear all of the admission eligibility before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find here the detailedAbhilashi University admissions process:
Step 1: Abhilashi University Application Process 2025

Abhilashi University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Abhilashi University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Abhilashi University is entrance and merit-based, depending on the course. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as AUCET PG, NEET for the selection of respective classes. Admission to the BA programme at the university is merit-based
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount ofAbhilashi University feeto secure their seats.

faqs.answer: For MSc Zoology at Abhilashi University, a candidate must have a bachelor's degree with a principal subject of Zoology. A minimum of 50% aggregate in the final exam is necessary, while 45% is sufficient for SC/ST students. Apart from this, admission requires a valid AUCET score. The intake capacity for this programme at Abhilashi University is 30.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MSc Agriculture at Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: For Abhilashi University's MSc Agriculture courses, applicants must have a BSc or BSc (Hons) in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, or Sericulture with 50% marks. Selection is on the basis of AUCET or CSKHPKV entrance exam scores. The specialisations in Plant Pathology and Entomology each have 8 seats. Abhilashi University selection is merit and entrance exam-based.

faqs.question: What is the starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: The starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University usually range from INR 5 to 30 LPA as per the chosen MBA specialization. Finance, marketing, general management, business analytics, and entrepreneurship are among the top MBA specialisations that frequently yield the greatest pay after graduation. The highest-paying positions in India after an MBA range from INR 5 to 30 LPA. For the fresher of just within a year in the industry, the median salary range stands at INR 302,326 per annum . On the other hand, with more experience of between 5-9 years, the median salary per annum is about INR 719,315 per annum . With other experience levels, you stand to earn more with position attained in the company and the status of the particular company too playing a part. Top 10 companies hiring after the course. There are a whole lot of places to work as an MBA holder. Virtually all sectors will one time or the other place adverts for vacancies. Some of them in the top 10 are: Aditya Birla Group HCL technologies JPMorgan Chase New Gen Software IEEE corporate National Textile Corporation Ltd. Amazon seller Services Pvt. Ltd. Cisco Systems, Inc. Global Eagle Entertainment India Infrastructure Finance Company Ltd.

hostel.description: University hostels are well furnished, spacious, clean with excellent hygienic, modern style rooms.All Rooms are properly ventilated, spacious and equipped with separate beds, study tables and cupboards and also having the facility of common room with all amenities like television, newspapers and magazines.

library.description: Abhilashi University has a fully equipped library which runs on automated software. It is housed in its own building and located centrally in the campus. It feeds all types of readers by getting issued the books whereas journals, magazines and copies of the articles are for consultation in the library. The University library is equipped with the text books, reference books and research journals of di?erent subjects. Access to online journals is through INFLIBNET and DELNET. The new relevant books are being added to the library stock regularly. The regular timings of the library are extended as per the demands of the students. Another unit of library has been opened in the Abhilashi Ayurvedic College and Research Institute (A Department of Abhilashi University). Working hours of the library are from 10 am to 6 pm on every working day, except Sundays and national holidays. All the students, employees and authorities of the University are the members of the library.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Anatomy Lab, Gynecology & Andrology Lab, Physiology & Biochemistry Lab

reviews.review_heading: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. ...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Labs contain enough equipment for us. Libraries also provide almost every book that is needed related to our subjects. 
There is a cafeteria inside the campus that provides good food.
Hostels are also good but I do not live in hostel so don't know much about it.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the study environment, infrastructure, and climate of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a good and beautiful environment. Digital classrooms are available with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good and are now restructured with more cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It serves good food three times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Heaven for those who love study and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are free compact classrooms are clean and medical facility also available. There are lots of sports, festivals all these are available at the campus and also have a canteen facility, and all hostels rooms are well- designed with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is very peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are decent. Hostels are very good. Classrooms are spacious. There is a decent library in this college. Modern facilities are not available such as KFC, Domino's, etc. Laboratory technician and helper positions are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are not qualified, good placements for all the students, infrastructure was good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well maintained there. All the important items were present. Wi-Fi facilities were not available there. There was a well-maintained Library where all books were available. Labs were properly maintained and all the chemicals were available there.

reviews.review_heading: Agriculture is the best course for this era.
reviews.review_text: Quality food should be given in our institute and the quality of games should also be improved. WiFi is available for the students and labs are also updated. All the needful facilities are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Abhilashi University is a good university.
reviews.review_text: Everything on the campus was good, and we had many facilities like a library and a huge ground. The food served in the canteen was tasty and good for health. Everything on the campus was very good. Wi-Fi was the only thing which was not provided. But it is essential to learn things.

faqs.answer: Central Electrochemical Research Institute offers a UG Degree course in Engineering. The course is available in Full Time mode. Central Electrochemical Research Institute has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Chemical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Are there any specializations offered by Central Electrochemical Research Institute?

faqs.answer: Central Electrochemical Research Institute has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

faqs.answer: Central Electrochemical Research Institute courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Central Electrochemical Research Institute goes up to 40.

Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling registrations are ongoing, whereas the general TNEA Counselling process will start in July. TNEA counselling process includes registration, assignment of random numbers, certificate verifications, rank list publication, and finally the counselling. admission_process.title: Global Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Global Institute of Management and Technology admission is a multi-step process. Candidates seeking for getting admission to UG/ Diploma courses of the university must go through a detailed entrance-based admission process. To admit the right candidates, the institute shortlists candidates based on selection criteria, which include filling out the application form, appearing for the entrance exam, etc. Check out the step-by-step admission process for GIMT given below:
Step 1: Global Institute of Management and Technology Application Process 2025

The GIMT admission process begins by filling out an application form on the official website of GIMT. If candidates wish to apply for more than one programme, they need to fill out a separate form for each course by paying an additional application fee. The new users are required to generate login credentials and fill an online application form with all the relevant details and documents and submit the form on the admission portal of Global Institute of Management and Technology.
Step 2: Global Institute of Management and Technology Selection Process

Global Institute of Management and Technology admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For most of the UG & Diploma courses, candidates are shortlisted based on merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Candidates are required to appear for entrance exams such as JEE Main or WBJEE to get into the BTech course.
Step 3: The Final Offer Letter

Candidates who clear the admission process and make it to the final shortlist receive the final offer letter. Candidates with the final offer for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat. Candidates are required to pay the course fee through the means given by the GIMT.

Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BCA course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 40% aggregate. Global Institute of Management and Technology's admission process is merit-based.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to BCA at Global Institute of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: To enrol in a BCA course at Global Institute of Management and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The institute offers full-time BCA courses lasting four years. Students are selected based on merit. In addition to the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Global Institute of Management and Technology without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, to get admission for the BTech, BBA, BCA, and After 10 Diploma courses at Global Institute of Management and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Candidates must pass Class 12 for the UG courses and Class 10 for the After 10 Diploma course. The selection criteria are based on entrance-exam scores.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered by Global Institute of Management and Technology in the admission process 2025?
faqs.answer: GIMT offers various courses at the UG and After 10 Diploma level. Following are the courses on offer at the admission process 2025:BTech: The four year course is designed for candidates wishing to build a career in the field of Engineering.After 10 Diploma: Candidates can choose from various Diploma specialisations in the fields of IT and Management.BCA: Candidates are shortlisted to the three year UG course based on their CET scores.BHHA: Candidates are shortlisted to the three year UG course based on their CET scores.

faqs.question: How to apply for admission to various courses at Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT)?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to get admission must take part in the Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT) admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT) eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. Follow the Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT) application process mentioned below:Step 1:Visit the official website of Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT).Step 2:Select the required course.Step 3:Pay the application fee.Step 4:Fill out and submit the application form with the required information.

hostel_campus.college_name: Global Institute of Management & Technology (GIMT) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: College is very helpful. All teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very nice. College is very helpful. All departments are very nice. Hostel food is so delicious. All foods are available in our canteen. Medical facilities and sports are so nice. All is good in college. Canteen food is very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: The management is too bad. Pursuing B.Tech from this college is the wrong decision.
reviews.review_text: A decent infrastructure can be seen. Wi-Fi is not available for students. On campus, there is no hostel facility available. Canteen is available but the prices of food are too high. The classrooms are comfortable, and the academic curriculum feels outdated.

reviews.review_heading: Good for nothing, worse college ever.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms are below average. Our toilets are very disgusting. The food of canteen is not edible, not properly cooked and the oil is not replaced.
It is very unhealthy not even a good ambiance with the heat of this summer we are melting in the classroom.

reviews.review_heading: I won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are not yet as well-structured as they should be. The structure of the college is too poor.

reviews.review_heading: College with good connectivity, a large campus, and many advantages and disadvantages.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students which college claims on its website. Most of the students stay in the college hostel. There are many mess facilities around our college. The canteen food is so good that I have eaten it once and never want to have it.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money, despite all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college did not have any Wi-Fi facilities for students; they have Wi-Fi for their only office work and for the computer lab, although they also did not have sufficient equipment to show every practical lab experiment. They also have a library for all students.

reviews.review_heading: GIMT is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is good. The quality of the food is good. They conduct sports and games twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but they know only money.
reviews.review_text: Facility is good. Infrastructure is good. Labs are good. Wi-Fi not available in labs and classrooms are only available in campus. I don't know about hostel facilities. I have never seen hostel of our college. Canteen’s food is not so good. Below average food is present in the canteen. Toilets are bad. Sports and games are available here.

reviews.review_heading: I strongly recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: In this college all facilites like updated laboratory, classrooms, library with proper syllabus oriented books, employment news. And all job oriented papers. Accommodation is good, there is different boys hostel and girls hostel, hostel facilities average etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because placements provided are not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library are excellent. Hostel facility is not good. The breakfast served in the canteen was not good for students health, otherwise all times the food was good. Medical facilities were available. Sports were held for 2 days duration. Games are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GIMT - Global Institute of Management & Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities, and there is a Wi-Fi facility on every floor. There were a library, furnished classrooms and labs for practicals. The quality of the food served in the mess is pretty good. Hostel facilities are also good. Sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: GIMT is an average college and is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi service is available in our college, and the classrooms are well cleaned and well disciplined. The library service is also good, and the quality of the food served in the canteen is much better now. Medical facilities are available here. Sports and games are organised by our college once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provided good placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided various facilities. We had Wi-Fi on every floor. There were a library, furnished classrooms, electrical labs for the practical test of machines, and there was also a mechanical lab. The quality of the food served in the mess was pretty good. Hostel facilities were also good. Sports facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides quality education but poor placements and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-furnished. Wi-Fi facility is available here, but it has a limit of 35 MB, which is very less. Classrooms are very good with adequate light and air. The library is below-average, and it lacks some books. The old hostel was shut down. The canteen food is average, but the menu is customised. First-aid and medical facilities are available here, but there is a lack of game enthusiasm and a gym on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities are available in our institute. And infrastructure is also good and playground also available in our institute campus. In the institute, there is a big library. Enough spaces for reading, seating, group discussion purpose. Classrooms are very cleaned and spaces. In our institute, there is a Wi-Fi facilities ( high-speed internet). Canteen are also available for both teachers and students. Well made and tasty food is offered by the canteen.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Nirwan University:

college_info.intro: Nirwan University provides various undergraduate, postgraduate, and integrated courses. NUJ provides programs in the stream of engineering, pharmacy, management, computer science and humanities. The flagship programmes include BTech and BPharm. Some of the courses provided by the university include BTech, MBA, MSc, PGDCA, BPT, BSc, BA LLB and others. Below are the Nirwan University popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    Nirwan University experiences moderately competitive admission. While the degree of competition might be different for all the various courses, applicants need to satisfy certain eligibility conditions before entering undergraduate and postgraduate programs. The major portion of UG admissions is done based on the candidate's performance in All India Common Entrance Examination or Nirwan University Entrance Examination. PG admissions for the MBA similarly require entrance exam scores. In addition, a few seats are reserved for the students who belong to the Rajasthan state, therefore it is not too competitive at this level. Admission process: document verification and interview rounds
faqs.question: Is Nirwan University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Usually these documents are required for admission to Nirwan University:Date of birth proofClass 10+2 mark sheet for UG Courses or Degree certificate for PG coursesTransfer and Migration CertificateEntrance exam score card, if issuedDomicile certificate for students belonging to the state of Rajasthan.Passport size photographsCopy of Aadhar Card.These documents become necessary for establishing eligibility and to complete the admission process. Still, seek advice from the admission office of the university for the requirements that may have been amended or are additional in nature.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.

review_content.Placements: Nirwan University is offering good placements and internship opportunities to the MBA course students. The average percentage of students placed in our course is 30-40%. The average package offered lies between 4-9 LPA. Various marketing and sales companies visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduation Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Average experience but satisfied.

review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are best known, as they placed approximately 70% of their students in high-tech profile jobs like Analyst, Hardware Engineer, and Data Scientist. Top companies that came for recruitment include TCS, Tesla, JIO, and many more. About 40% of students get internships also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .

review_content.Placements: The college is best for jobs and placements. The percentage of students placed in our course is around 90 percent, and the top roles are system analyst, computer hardware engineer, and data analyst. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, and the highest package is 16 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university boasts state of the art of facilities in equipped and modern laboratories and a comprehensive library and the hostel are good with cctv and guards are there mess food is homely food and sports grounds are there and sports are conducted twice a year .

faqs.answer: According to the Shiksha ratings, Nirwan University has been rated 4.4 out of 5 (overall). The university provides all the basic as well as modern amenities to the students. The placement and training cell helps students to prepare for interviews. The highest package offered is 18 lacs per annum, with average and the lowest packages being around 5 lacs and 3.4 lacs per annum, respectively.
faqs.question: Q: Is Nirwan University, Jaipur a good university?

faqs.answer: The MBA program at Nirwan University is one of the best courses because of its fine curriculum, industry-focused character, and excellent placement options. The course is fashioned on leadership, innovation, and strategic thinking to facilitate competencies in the students to face global business challenges. Moreover, the programs of the university also get the benefit of specialist faculty, industry collaborations, and several internships and live projects for polishing hands-on learning. To add to the mix, Nirwan University graduates receive remunerations competing with the industry, making this study program an enticing option for aspiring professionals.
faqs.question: Q: Why MBA is considered as the top course at Nirwan University?

faqs.answer: Nirwan University is considered a prestige university, especially in its variety of courses, such as engineering, management, and hospitality. The placement cell is quite strong at this university as it ensures students find a place in the most prominent firms. More than 600 students were placed in companies last year in 2022. University focuses on industry relevant education where the programs are designed according to the needs of the market. It is still relatively young, established in 2017, which must make its national rankings different compared to the older institutions. Generally speaking, it provides solid educational opportunities in technical and management fields.
faqs.question: Q: Is Nirwan University a good college?

overview_faqs.question: Is Nirwan University, Jaipur a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: According to the Shiksha ratings, Nirwan University has been rated 4.4 out of 5 (overall). The university provides all the basic as well as modern amenities to the students. The placement and training cell helps students to prepare for interviews. The highest package offered is 18 lacs per annum, with average and the lowest packages being around 5 lacs and 3.4 lacs per annum, respectively.

overview_faqs.question: Is Nirwan University a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Nirwan University is considered a prestige university, especially in its variety of courses, such as engineering, management, and hospitality. The placement cell is quite strong at this university as it ensures students find a place in the most prominent firms. More than 600 students were placed in companies last year in 2022. University focuses on industry relevant education where the programs are designed according to the needs of the market. It is still relatively young, established in 2017, which must make its national rankings different compared to the older institutions. Generally speaking, it provides solid educational opportunities in technical and management fields.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.Tech. program at Nirwan University?
overview_faqs.answer: Nirwan University B.Tech. application fee consists of several heads:Enrollment fee: INR 1,000 (one time)Registration fee: INR 500 (one time)Examination fee: INR 1500 (for each semester)To add on, the B.Tech. programme course fee varies from INR 1,60,000 to INR 2,60,000 for the complete course, as per the specialization.

review_summary.college_name: Nirwan University Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B. A. LLB - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: In short, Nirwan University is a mid university.

content.Placements: There are few students who got placement that too in a very low package. Most of the students who got placement were those who had some connections with the employers. Same thing goes for the internship. Although students worked under some well-known lawyers, which gave them experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university and hostel is very good. There are a total of six buildings in the university. The university consists of various labs, a library, a hostel, and a hall where various functions take place. There is also a huge field in which you can play various games. Wi-Fi is okay. The food in the canteen is mid.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Sales & Marketing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: MBA in Sales and Marketing from Nirwan University.

content.Placements: Nirwan University has decent on-campus placements every year in the MBA course. On average, around 30%-35% of students get successfully placed. The salary packages offered lie between 6 LPA-8 LPA. Most students get placed in the sales field. Internships are also provided to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is good. The college campus is large with various courses available for students. Every classroom and lab has Wi-Fi connectivity. Library and various other necessary facilities are available. Sports and many extracurricular activities are also conducted at this university.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Sales & Marketing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.

content.Placements: Nirwan University is offering good placements and internship opportunities to the MBA course students. The average percentage of students placed in our course is 30-40%. The average package offered lies between 4-9 LPA. Various marketing and sales companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduation Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Average experience but satisfied.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are best known, as they placed approximately 70% of their students in high-tech profile jobs like Analyst, Hardware Engineer, and Data Scientist. Top companies that came for recruitment include TCS, Tesla, JIO, and many more. About 40% of students get internships also.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .

content.Placements: The college is best for jobs and placements. The percentage of students placed in our course is around 90 percent, and the top roles are system analyst, computer hardware engineer, and data analyst. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, and the highest package is 16 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The university boasts state of the art of facilities in equipped and modern laboratories and a comprehensive library and the hostel are good with cctv and guards are there mess food is homely food and sports grounds are there and sports are conducted twice a year .

admission_overview.college_name: Nirwan University Jaipur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Nirwan University admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Nirwan Universityoffers courses at UG, PG, After 10th, Certificate and Doctorate levels. Some of the courses include BHM, B.Sc(Hons.), M.Lib.Sc. and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 12,000 - 10,00,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 54 months - 5 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

faqs.answer: Nirwan University does not give specific qualifying cutoff marks for its MBA course. Admission is generally made on the basis of merit and marks scored in entrance exams, such as CUET-PG, and other relevant examination tests conducted by different institutions. faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for BTech course admissions at Nirwan University is that candidate should have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggreagte. Additionally, the fees for the BTech course is around INR 2.6 lakh.

faqs.question: Is Nirwan University hard to get?
faqs.answer: Nirwan University experiences moderately competitive admission. While the degree of competition might be different for all the various courses, applicants need to satisfy certain eligibility conditions before entering undergraduate and postgraduate programs. The major portion of UG admissions is done based on the candidate's performance in All India Common Entrance Examination or Nirwan University Entrance Examination. PG admissions for the MBA similarly require entrance exam scores. In addition, a few seats are reserved for the students who belong to the Rajasthan state, therefore it is not too competitive at this level. Admission process: document verification and interview rounds

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Nirwan University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must clear Nirwan University's entrance exam, NUCET to get admission in the university. The university conducts NUCET online for 2 hours and students qualifying for the exam are eligible to get admission.For some programs such as BE/BTech, the score of JEE Mains and JEE Advanced are accepted. For UG programs, the university accepts CUET or Class 12 merit scores.

faqs.question: How do I get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur students must apply for NUCET. Nirwan University Common Eligibility Test (NUCET) is the university online entrance exam which is conducted for 2 hours. Students scoring valid scores in NUCET are eligible to get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur. For PhD programs, the university conducts Nirwan University Research Entrance Test (NRET) or  scores from a recognised entrance exam like UGC-NET.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Nirwan University?
faqs.answer: Steps to apply for admission in Nirwan University:Ensure Eligibility: This is one where you must check if you meet the eligibility criteria as per the course that you will like to pursue (UG, PG, or integrated programs).Fill up application form: Online/Offline application form is available on the official website.Take entrance exam: If entry exam exists and required, then appear for the same entrance exam that may be CUET-PG or any university test.Submit Documents: Necessary documents will be submitted that include 10+2 mark sheets, degree certificates, and scorecards, etc.Pay All Fee: Finish all admission processes by paying fees.

reviews.review_heading: In short, Nirwan University is a mid university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university and hostel is very good. There are a total of six buildings in the university. The university consists of various labs, a library, a hostel, and a hall where various functions take place. There is also a huge field in which you can play various games. Wi-Fi is okay. The food in the canteen is mid.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Sales and Marketing from Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is good. The college campus is large with various courses available for students. Every classroom and lab has Wi-Fi connectivity. Library and various other necessary facilities are available. Sports and many extracurricular activities are also conducted at this university.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

reviews.review_heading: Average experience but satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .
reviews.review_text: The university boasts state of the art of facilities in equipped and modern laboratories and a comprehensive library and the hostel are good with cctv and guards are there mess food is homely food and sports grounds are there and sports are conducted twice a year .

reviews.review_heading: The review of B.Sc. course in Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for this course and hostel is excellent. Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are available 24 hours a day. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is excellent. The hostel is good with good educational environment.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Jaipur area.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well and good. The infrastructure like Wi-Fi facility good toilet, canteen furniture. hi-tech labs are well furnished and the hostel is good. The food served is good. We have good medical facilities. They organise yearly tournaments and many students participate in sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. Not at all, but many facilities are available in my college. It takes money from someone else to do it.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and nice placement .
reviews.review_text: Teaching and nice courses are available in universities; take admission and brighten your future; free Wi-Fi is available in hostels; good conditions are in labs; all machines are there. Clean classrooms are there; a free library is available in college.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Good but not a great-looking college. It is better in college if you have good marks.
reviews.review_text:
Average facilities are available in the college hostel.
No mess is available.
Canteen food is boring.
Only one sport is there: cricket.
There is no WiFi in the hostel.
The surroundings are not good.
No medical facilities are there.
No playground is there for boys and girls in the hostel.
One common lab is there for study.

reviews.review_heading: College of Engineering, Ambajogai review on Placements, Faculty & Facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, they are very supportive. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. Classrooms are good and clean. There is a huge ground for encouraging sports. There is no hostel for students. The canteen facilities is just say okay only. There are lots if academic and academic books in the library. All facilities and infrastructure of our college is excellent library, equipment in lab, sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: You can choose this college for getting knowledge but do not expect for placement for civil sutdents
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very nice. The college has enough sports ground. The interior of the classrooms is very comfortable and having good Wi-Fi facility. The library has a very large collection of various author's books. The hostel facility for boys and girls for the non-local students is available. The canteen food is good and the kitchen is very hygienic. But they do not provide medical facilities to students except first aid kit. It is the best college in the Rural area.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff along with training but placements are less.
reviews.review_text: The courses offered by the institute were good. They provide different facilities with premium quality. The canteen has somewhat eatable quality. Sports and games were the best.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good enough.
reviews.review_text: Excellent Classrooms, Nice Library, having good enough sports ground, Wi-Fi facility is available, Food quality in canteen is also good, Boys Hostel, Girls Hostel is available for non-local students. Social help is also given by the college. Infrastructure of college is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available for 24 hours. Highly sophisticated classrooms are provided with the best seating arrangements. A computer and projector are available in every classroom. The library is available for students for 24 hours. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Simply outstanding and you have to visit my campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are strongest. The Wi-Fi is unbelievable. The labs and the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Many books are available in the huge library. The unlimited sports and games are played that big ground this all are available on my campuses. The quality of labs and classrooms is air-conditioned. There are well-educated teachers available. There are no issues with the college. It's the best campuses.

reviews.review_heading: Good teachers and infrastructure, but they should improve the campus recruitment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. Everyone has their ID and password for accessing the Wi-Fi. The labs in our college are entirely developed, and all the instruments are available in the labs. The classrooms in the college are reliable and comfortable. With lush green surroundings and a lake on the premises, the college campus is beautiful.

Good college located in rural place. Principal and faculties are very visionary. For employees the college is like government. Every faculty is satisfied... Campus is small as compare to PUNE city but other than this everything is there.

highlights.summary: Dr. H N National College of Engineering is an institute. It is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Dr. H N National College of Engineering provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 6 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Information Technology. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The student intake for these courses is 600. Dr. H N National College of Engineering offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Dr. H N National College of Engineering offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: H N National College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: This is a new college, and I'm in the 2 year of it. Starting placements haven't been conducted yet, but the college has a partnership with many companies due to name. Namely, Infosys and stuff we get free springboard for now, the teachers have many connections through which you can get your internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay, not too good, not too bad. Washrooms are bad, but their renovation is. There is a pu block, an MBA and MCA block and an engineering block. Sports are very good, there is a huge ground for that. There is a gym. The canteen is bad. Wi-Fi is trash. The library and computer lab are the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college, and I would recommend it.

review_content.Placements: Since it's a recently opened college, there are no placements for the engineering stream. However, for the other streams, there are really good placements. They did tell us that they will be providing placements later on. Instead, they are offering extra internship training programs from MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course I am currently in is the most trending one. Hence, it is good. In fact, the faculty is really very good and supportive. About the hostel, that too is recently opened. So, facilities like washing machines and Wi-Fi are not yet provided. But it will be done soon.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Delhi College of Technology and Management is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. The fee structure for the Delhi College of Technology and Management programmes is around INR 2,12,000 to 2,55,000.

review_content.Placements: Around 25 students get placed. The highest salary package is 6 LPA. TCS offers placements with the top roles. Internships are also provided.

answer.text: Delhi College of Technology and Management is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Delhi College of Technology and Management has a review rating of 2.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.9 on campuslife, 2.7 on placements, 3.1 on faculty and 2.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Delhi College of Technology and Management a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Delhi College of Technology and Management is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Delhi College of Technology and Management has a review rating of 2.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.9 on campuslife, 2.7 on placements, 3.1 on faculty and 2.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Delhi College of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A clear look inside DCTM college.

content.Placements: Approximately 90 percent students are placed every year from my course. The lowest package was 5LPA and the highest package was around 27 LPA. Average package is 7-8 LPA. TCS and Infosys are top recruiting companies. Internship programs are not much focused but still around 40 percent students get internship. We can get a role of software developed.
content.Infrastructure: There are multiple classrooms for different activities. Many labs like computer lab, Physics lab, workshop, library etc. Hostel and campus is huge. Quality of food is also nice. There are many grounds for sports and games like basketball, football, cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Delhi College of Technology and Management is not a good college.

content.Placements: There's no placement cell in the college. There are no on-campus placements. Students have to go for off-campus opportunities on their own. The scenario for getting an internship is not different. Students have gotten good salary packages anyway. The highest salary package is 6 LPA to 8 LPA and almost 50% of the batch is placed.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar. The hostel is quite affordable, but the struggle to get a good meal is an issue. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are fine. The canteen is inadequate. It is not open regularly. There is a good ground on which students can play volleyball, basketball, or cricket in their spare time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Delhi College of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: Around 25 students get placed. The highest salary package is 6 LPA. TCS offers placements with the top roles. Internships are also provided.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, classrooms are quite large, the sports and games are available. The quality of food in mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant and makes the students industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members and administration.

content.Placements: Around 10% of the students got placed by the college. The lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA, and the average salary package is around 1.5 LPA. Some students got placed in companies like Airtel & L&T, etc. Most of the companies come and go empty-handed because the skills required for the job were unsatisfactory.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were not so good and the infrastructure was mediocre. There was no Wi-Fi available, and the mess service was available if you're a hostler. The sports ground is available and canteen facilities were also available. The college was situated in a remote area, and you have to walk about 2-3 km the main road to get to the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is value for money. Faculty and infrastructure are good, but placements are very poor.

content.Placements: The placement rate of our college is very poor in the last couple of years. If you want to get placed through campus placements, then this college is not for you. Getting placed totally depends on the students. If they have skills and knowledge, no one can stop them from getting placed in good companies. But in the beginning, the college assures students about providing placements. But in the end, none of the companies visited our college for placements, but this issue is not taken seriously. Overall, the placement rate of our college is very poor.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive. I'm sure you will not be disappointed when you get admission in our college. The library has a lot of new books to read, and you can issue a book for almost 30 days, which is good. After that, you can renew the book from your laptop or phone. Classrooms are very attractive and clean. A/C facilities are available in the classrooms. If you're a sportsperson, this college is definitely for you because the college organises many tournaments. Medical facilities are good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls, and they are in good conditions. A/C and non-A/C rooms are available in the hostel, and you can take one as per your choice. You can access Wi-Fi in the hostel. All the labs are huge, with all the required equipment. Bus facilities are available for those who are coming from Delhi and Faridabad. So, the students don't need to worry about the infrastructure.

admission_process.title: Delhi College of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Delhi College of Technology and Management admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Delhi College of Technology and Managementoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,12,000 - 2,55,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

description: Delhi College of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. Delhi College of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. reviews.review_heading: A brief of Delhi college of technology and management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure seems quiet well. Although some setbacks like the air-conditioning, broken tiles on the floor etc. needs some attention. The classrooms are well lit which is good. reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with infrastructure and teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are well furnished and have all the important equipment, computer labs are my favorite one. The library has a huge collection of books, journals, etc. Sports and games events are organized as scheduled.

For sports, I have played basketball every year and there is no stable coach, and last yearthere was no coach. For hostel there are deadly insects crawling everywhere. I can personally provide faculty witness for that.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Faridabad region !
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for the students, it has been enabled with all the hi-tech facilities and equipment. They have 2 boys hostels and 1 hostel for girls, With multicuisine food and proper drinking water. Hence the in fracture is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are quite good, but the college efforts day by day is decreasing to improve the facilities.

There are no sports facilities for girls, and they invite the girls for playing at the last moment without any practice. Wi-Fi facility with only 20 Mb of data per day is provided to the students. The quality of food provided in th...

reviews.review_heading: In the NCR area, our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities of our college are in very good condition. Labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, etc., are very good. Quality of food served in the canteen is good. Hostal rooms are good, and the water provided there is also chilled. There is no ragging in our college. Overall, our college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Money freindly college for engineering.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is good but lacks many things for a college student ( you might not get to enjoy as there are lesser vacant areas in the campus) 
The classrooms and labs are alright. 
There's time to time dispute for quality of mess food. The mess department keeps changing as a reason.

reviews.review_heading: The college is active in providing placements and training.
reviews.review_text: The college has an impressive look. It has all the facilities that a proper college should have, and the campus environment is good. It has a huge cricket ground and a beautiful basketball court. The campus has a boys' hostel with both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Not the best colleg,  but an okay one to achieve your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent campus with wi-fi connectivity. The labs are well-equipped with the motive of sole purpose. The college has a well-maintained library. The campus doesn't have many academic blocks. The campus is huge with lavish greenery. It has a nice playground with well-maintained basketball and volleyball courts. For food, the campus has a nice cafeteria. The infrastructure is not the best neither the worst.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for those who only want a degree, and nothing apart from that.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and a normal person can easily adjust here. Proper classrooms, labs and library are available, but labs should be updated with the required software installed in the system.
